data.name: B.E.S.T
data.detailed_description:
準備好成為最優秀的學生，並贏得50萬美元大獎嗎？



你初來美國，準備進行為期一個學期的經濟學與市場營銷的學習，結果你發現自己被迫加入了一場比賽。在這場比賽中，你必須通過耐力挑戰、體育與知識測試，並與合適的人結成同盟，才能成為第一。在比賽開始時，總共有100名選手。而最後，只會剩下一個！也即是優勝者！!



這是一部以比賽為背景的成人視覺小說，你在其中扮演主角。而整個故事和主角的成功完全取決於你！通過你在遊戲中的選擇，你可以成為班上最優秀的學生，獲得比賽獎勵，也可以幫助或背叛你的朋友，以幫助他們提升排名……或將他們淘汰。



做出正確的選擇或決定，在比賽中與那些對你最有幫助的人結盟。
規則只有一個：通過層層考驗，獲得最終的勝利！

data.short_description: 《優勝者》是一部成人視覺小說，包含多個決定性選擇和多種可能的結局。參與各種挑戰！幫助或背叛你的朋友！目標只有一個：成為最後的優勝者。至於你想成為什麽樣的人，這完全取決於你自己！
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 義大利文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows Vista, 7, 8, 10, 11
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註:
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.6 or higher
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 備註:

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Système d'exploitation et processeur 64 bits nécessaires
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 備註: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9 or OpenGL ES 2 required

data.name: B.E.S.T
data.detailed_description:
Ready to become the top student and take home the $500,000 prize?

🎓 The Concept

Freshly arrived in the United States for a semester in Economics and Marketing, you’re thrown into a one-of-a-kind competition: the B.E.S.T.
100 participants. $500,000 on the line. Only one winner.

It’s up to you to build alliances, seduce your partners, and decide who deserves your trust… and who deserves betrayal.

💔 Romance, Seduction, and Rivalries

Every choice shapes your relationships:

  • Forge strong friendships… or ignite explosive rivalries.

  • Experience passionate romances with unique characters, each with their own secrets and personality.

  • Unlock optional adult scenes woven into a complete and immersive story.

🏆 A Competition Where Every Choice Counts

Take part in social, athletic, and strategic challenges.

Climb the rankings, help your allies, or eliminate your rivals.

Each episode delivers new challenges and branching storylines.

✨ Key Features ✨

  • 🏆 A unique mix of romance, competition & betrayal — who will you trust, who will you seduce, and who will you betray?

  • 🎓 100 contestants, 500,000 $ at stake — fight your way to the top.

  • 💕 Multiple romance routes — each girl with her own story, personality, and choices that matter.

  • ⚽ Sports & challenges — push your skills and face tough rivals.

  • 📱 Interactive phone system — messages, social app, and exclusive content.

  • 🎶 Immersive soundtrack and atmosphere.

  • 🖼️ Over 4,000 renders and 150 animations bringing the story to life.

  • 🔀 Your choices matter — different paths, relationships, and endings depending on how you play.

data.short_description: B.E.S.T is an adult visual novel where romance, competition, and betrayal intertwine. 100 participants. $500,000 at stake: who will you trust? Make your choices, build your relationships, seduce or betray… and become the last one standing.
data.supported_languages: English, French, Spanish - Latin America, Italian, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Portuguese - Brazil
